strengths: 20 years of software engineering experience exceeds the 15-year minimum, with demonstrated breadth across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Currently contributing to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq, showing emerging expertise directly aligned with role focus
Founded and operates GISCollective since 2016, demonstrating entrepreneurial capability and ability to build platforms from concept to adoption
concerns: AI expertise is nascent (2 months in current role); no prior demonstrated AI/ML product development, platform building, or recognized thought leadership in the AI domain
Current title is Staff Software Engineer, not Director-level IC; no evidence of strategic advisory experience with customers or partners on technology adoption
No Master's degree or PhD in AI-related field; educational background is in CS and fine arts, not specialized AI study

key_factors.factor: Lack of demonstrated AI product strategy or thought leadership
Current seniority level (Staff Engineer, not Principal/Director)

response.justification: Szabo is a strong foundational engineer with 20 years of experience and an MIT degree, currently working on AI-agent infrastructure. However, the Principal Engineer role explicitly requires "recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI" and director-level strategic capability. His AI work is very recent (2 months), and his résumé shows no prior AI/ML product development, strategic advisory experience, or positioning at the director-level IC expected for this role. While his entrepreneurial background and current trajectory toward AI infrastructure are positive signals, they do not yet constitute the specialized, demonstrated AI strategy expertise required.
